articles.title: Flare Brings Ethereum Compatibility to Stellar
articles.description: Flare Networks has announced that it will integrate Stellar Lumens (XLM) with its smart contract platform, thereby offering compatibility with the Ethereum blockchain. Flare will be integrating $XLM as an F-Asset, bringing XLM to scalable smart contracts and a trustless gateway to #Stellar. Decentralisation is far too important for maximalism. Ecosystems must be united. @stellarorg...

articles.title: Cardano is now a top-three cryptocurrency as ADA price soars 27% in 24 hours
articles.description: Cardano is soaring, though Ada's price still has a long way to go to beat its record high vs. Bitcoin.

articles.title: Former Ripple CTO dumps more XRP; here’s how much XRP is left in Jed McCaleb’s wallet
articles.description: Data from XRPscan suggests that over the week, former Ripple CTO Jed McCaleb has moved yet another large amount of XRP from his wallet. From 20 to 26 February, McCaleb moved more than 135.8 million XRP from his tacostand wallet in six separate transactions. The former chief made a payment of more than 19 million […]

articles.title: Grayscale Exploring New Investment Opportunities in 23 Altcoins, Including Chainlink, Polkadot, and Cardano
articles.description: The digital asset market is a very dynamic one and one in which new products are introduced every day. articles.title: Grayscale Opens Doors to Altcoins, Exploring More Than 23 New Tokens
articles.description: Grayscale has listed 23 tokens as the firm notifies about the exploration of “new investment products.” Grayscale Is the New Coinbase Grayscale LLC has announced a probe into additional cryptocurrencies and possibly a separate class of investment products from the existing trusts. articles.title: Grayscale Confirms It Is Considering Making New Products on Chainlink, ADA, Polkadot, XMR and others
articles.description: Major crypto hedge fund Grayscale confirms that it is considering launching new products based on LINK, ADA, DOT, XMR, YFI and other promising altcoins

articles.title: Dubai Crypto Fund Sells $750 Million BTC to Buy More ADA, DOT
articles.description: With this move, the crypto investment fund would be selling most of the $1 billion under management to invest in the upstart blockchains. Both ADA and DOT are high-speed, low-cost smart contract deployment networks that claim to enable scalability. articles.title: A new version of #Pollen is out! Pollen v0.4.0 marks an important step towards #Nectar as it introduces the new and…

articles.description: We are releasing a new version of our Pollen testnet v0.4.0. With this version, we removed the value Tangle, introduced the approval switch, Markers and so much more. articles.title: Gaming Veteran Atari Is Moving to Ethereum Layer 2
articles.description: Layer 2 has a new arrival: Atari. Atari Eyes Layer 2 The video game developer is teaming up with Polygon, a scaling solution that recently rebranded from Matic Network. articles.title: Dubai Fund Sells $750 Million of Bitcoin to Buy Cardano, Polkadot

articles.title: 1inch Exchange Extends to Binance Smart Chain (BSC) Amid Rising ETH Gas Fees
articles.description: In a “natural step,” 1inch Exchange, the decentralized exchange (DEX) aggregator, is expanding to the Binance Smart Chain (BSC), as per an announcement on Feb 25. Extension to Binance Smart Chain (BSC) Consequently, they are deploying the 1INCH token on the BSC, availing 1inch Aggregation and Liquidity protocols, including staking features, to BSC users.
